title: Cobblemon: Paleontology
description: Adds a new Villager Profession, enabling an easier method of obtaining rare fossil Pokemon that otherwise are a pain to find.
body:
![Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, and Purple Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94907f12214e786a19356f5b619dba57012f1512.png)
No longer will you be burdened with traveling thousands of blocks just not even to get the fossil you want! Adds better accessibility to fossil Pokemon in Cobblemon by adding a new Villager Profession. Using the lab table will assign the villager the Paleontologist profession. They will sell brushes, shovels, fossil machine parts, and base cobblemon fossils. -----------------

Lab Table Recipes
![Oak Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a37c16f796938fc452361ce80a3b057b1fb88279.png) ![Spruce Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87f0c3c49754937f6a533f3692bd5c5c1c92a125.png) ![Birch Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b565fdf877fcec48c54bfca1b1a913487a4e65f3.png) ![Jungle Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e17c7c3d02d84513bacfb2ac09ef7943d39ae0b.png) ![Acacia Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd3c2488adb9f943d1a7a982b4e27e51b4c9b057.png) ![Dark Oak Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67c4afea4f5a058fc67cbf0d159478200c8bff28.png) ![Mangrove Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d15f2ae848615930dc8749fa8bc0795df672399.png) ![Cherry Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd2c2e83599d91a64c6c243251aeb5cd7efbf78e.png) ![Bamboo Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/820f5d3558532bddfe9170ea1b866c36c0370c27.png) ![Warped Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfbbc0c0cdb9a7b1d663e57d0528e90925d87767.png) ![Crimson Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67fec09b8892f8f75abb41c600aeb9a2623e9ca2.png) ![Apricorn Lab Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5b2db9e85d5408eaea3c4938add6a329a4b514.png)

❗ Beta 0.6.0+ is Cobblemon 1.7.3 compatible ❗
